title: U-Save
text:
U-Save - SupportGoWhere
U-Save
Share link
Quarterly rebates to offset HDB households’ utilities expenses. In FY2026, eligible households will receive up to $570 in U-Save rebates.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
$330 to $570 in U-Save rebates for eligible HDB households
Rebates will be credited quarterly
No application needed
Collapse all sections
About this support

GST Voucher (GSTV) – U-Save

$220 to $380 in GSTV – U-Save for eligible HDB households

Will be credited in April, July, October 2026, and January 2027

Budget 2026 U-Save

$110 to $190 for eligible HDB households on top of GSTV – U-Save, which helps households with utilities expenses, cushioning the impact of higher utility bills due to an increase in carbon tax from 2026

Will be credited to eligible households at the same time as the GSTV – U-Save, in April and July 2026

Who is this for?

Singaporean households living in HDB flats

If the HDB flat is partially rented out or not rented out, there must be at least 1 Singapore Citizen owner or occupier in the household

If the entire HDB flat is rented out, there must be at least 1 Singapore Citizen tenant

Household members living in the same flat must not own or have any interest in more than 1 property

How to apply?

No application needed

U-Save will be credited directly into eligible households’ utilities accounts with SP Services

Where can I find help?

GSTV – U-Save

Budget 2026 U-Save: More details will be provided when available

Singapore Power: 6671 7117

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 11 Mar 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
